name: Brownie Bottom Bourbon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake 1 brownie mix according to directions, but bake a few minutes less in the bottoms of 2 pie tins.
2. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Slowly beat in sugar.
4. Soften gelatin in cold water and add 1/3 of the bourbon. Heat this mixture over boiling water until gelatin dissolves.
5. Pour into yolks and stir briskly.
6. Add remaining bourbon.
7. Whip 1 cup of cream and fold into mixture.
8. Pour filling into brownie crust and chill for 4 hours.
9. Top with remaining cream whipped with a pinch of salt and sugar to taste.
10. Sprinkle shaved chocolate on top.
